name: -v
--version
options.description: Show program's version number and exit

name: -w
--wait
options.description: Wait for opened file to be closed

name: -g
--background
options.description: Do not bring the application to the foreground

name: -l
--line
options.description: Jump to specific line in opened document

name: -c
--column
options.description: Jump to specific column in opened document
